title: Cannot cast Cap'n Proto with named unions
poc: CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS test;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test.from_kafka
(
    id UInt64,
    `sampleType.typeA.valueA` UInt32,
    `sampleType.typeB.valueB` String
)
ENGINE = Kafka()
SETTINGS
    kafka_broker_list = '10.0.0.100:9092',
    kafka_topic_list = 'test-topic',
    kafka_group_name = 'clickhouse-test-group',
    kafka_format = 'CapnProto',
    kafka_schema = 'test:TestRecord',
    kafka_num_consumers = 1,
    kafka_max_block_size = 1048576;
key_bug_features: Casting named unions in Cap'n Proto schema fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS test.from_kafka (id UInt64, `sampleType.typeA.valueA` UInt32, `sampleType.typeB.valueB` String) ENGINE = Kafka() SETTINGS kafka_broker_list = '10.0.0.100:9092', kafka_topic_list = 'test-topic', kafka_group_name = 'clickhouse-test-group', kafka_format = 'CapnProto', kafka_schema = 'test:TestRecord', kafka_num_consumers = 1;
INSERT INTO test.from_kafka (id, `sampleType.typeA.valueA`, `sampleType.typeB.valueB`) VALUES (2, NULL, 'Sample Text');
SELECT id, `sampleType.typeA.valueA`, `sampleType.typeB.valueB` FROM test.from_kafka WHERE `sampleType.typeA.valueA` IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test.from_kafka WHERE `sampleType.typeB.valueB` LIKE '%Sample%';
